description_long: This is a standard Spalding basketball, featuring a classic orange-brown pebbled leather surface with black channel grooves dividing the ball into eight panels. The Spalding logo is prominently displayed in black and gold on one side, accompanied by a smaller NBA logo near the bottom. The ball's surface shows a realistic texture with subtle scuff marks and slight discoloration, indicating moderate use. The seams are deep and well-defined, providing grip and tactile feedback for handling. The overall shape is spherical, and the ball appears to be properly inflated, maintaining its roundness. No visible inflation valve is present in the provided views.
description: A well-textured Spalding basketball with black channel grooves, orange-brown leather, and visible branding. The ball shows realistic wear and a classic eight-panel design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Spalding logo in black and gold, with the NBA logo near the bottom and visible pebbled texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the deep black grooves and the pebbled leather surface, with no visible branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted orange-brown surface and black seams, with no logos or markings.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing part of the Spalding logo and the curvature of the black grooves.
attribute_brand_logo: Spalding logo in black and gold on the front panel, NBA logo in black near the bottom.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with deep black channel grooves forming a traditional basketball pattern.
attribute_visible_wear_or_graffiti: Subtle scuff marks and slight discoloration visible across the surface.
